---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem would this solve, or what workflow would it improve? Is it related
to a frustration with the current behavior?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or related items from [`docs/BACKLOG.md`](../../docs/BACKLOG.md).
